name: @photo-tools/filex-desktop
description: FileX Suite desktop shell for Windows packaging and native bridge work.
author: FileX

scripts.build:photo-selector: npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/photo-selector-app run build
scripts.dev:photo-selector: npm run build:shell && concurrently -k "npm --workspace @photo-tools/photo-selector-app run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4175" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4175 && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app FILEX_RENDERER_MODE=dev FILEX_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4175 electron ."
scripts.start:photo-selector: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron .
scripts.dist:photo-selector:win: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron-builder --win nsis
